# SteamGifts HTML fixtures

This directory stores captured SteamGifts pages used for parser regression tests and manual debugging.

## Files

- `homepage.html` — snapshot of the SteamGifts homepage used to validate giveaway parsing and UI-related selectors.

## Notes

- Keep fixtures free of credentials or private user data.
- Prefer adding smaller, focused fixtures for new regression tests instead of growing a single giant snapshot.
